artistContext.name: Seth Troxler
artistContext.summary: As a comparable youth on the scene, Seth Troxler's achievements far outweigh his tender age of 22. His Detroit roots are unmistakable and his recent relocation to Berlin has already earned him a place in the elite of the European techno scene. Seth's musical influences include the chirping of crickets, the whirring of space ships, and the sweet sounds of whistling voodoo magic. With much-hyped and played releases on revered labels such as Spectral, Wagon Repair and M_NUS, each join the dots of his distinctive sexy techno sound.

writer.title: Seth Troxler: A Distinctive Voice in Techno
writer.subtitle: Detroit roots and Berlin relocation define a rising talent.
writer.author: A. Stern
writer.excerpt: Seth Troxler's distinctive techno sound is shaped by his Detroit roots and recent relocation to Berlin, with releases on respected labels cementing his presence in the European scene.

content.text: Seth Troxler has quickly established himself as a distinctive voice in the techno scene. Despite his young age, his achievements are notable and his sound is unmistakably influenced by his Detroit roots.

His recent relocation to Berlin has further solidified his position within the European techno elite. Troxler's work is characterized by a distinctive style that draws from a range of unconventional influences.
Troxler's releases on respected labels such as Spectral, Wagon Repair, and M_NUS have garnered attention and praise. These works showcase his evolving approach to techno production and performance.
Recent releases including This Is Then, DJ-Kicks (Seth Troxler) [DJ Mix], and Mixmag Presents Seth Troxler: The Illusion Nouveau (DJ Mix) demonstrate his continued growth and influence in the genre.
